nameMeanings.name: Dolan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Aisling, Brennan, Bridgid, Cormac, Donovan, Dymphna, Eamon, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Liam.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhláin ‘descendant of Dubhshlán’, a personal name from dubh ‘black’ + slán ‘challenge’.
In some cases also an American shortened form of Slovenian Dolanc or Dolanec: vernacular variants of a habitational name for someone from any of numerous villages named Dol ‘small valley’.

variants.name: Dowling
meanings: Irish (Leinster): variant of Dolan 1, or a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dúnlaing, a North Leinster name meaning ‘descendant of Dúnlang’, an early personal name. Anglicized forms can be indistinguishable from those of Ó Dubhlainn and Ó Dubhláin.
English: variant of Dolling, probably a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English word, dolling, douling ‘dull fellow’.

variants.name: Dolin
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of several places in Ukraine and Belarus called Dolina, from Slavic dolina ‘valley’.
French: metonymic occupational name for a carpenter, from a derivative of doler ‘to shave or plane’.

variants.name: Dowlin
meanings: English: variant of Dolling (see Dowling ). This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Dooling
meanings: English: variant of Dolling, a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English dolling, douling, dulling ‘dull or stupid one’. Compare Doll , Dollins , and Duling .

variants.name: Daudelin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Fernand, Gilles, Marcel, Philias, Yvon.

French: patronymic, with fused preposition d(e) ‘of’, from the personal name Audelin, from the ancient Germanic name Aldalin, a pet form of compound names based on the element ald ‘old’. This surname is very rare in France. Compare Dolan , Dolen , and Dudley .

History: This surname was (first) brought to North America by Nicolas Daudelin from Rouen in Seine-Maritime, France, who married Anne Girard in Château-Richer, QC, in 1665. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Dolan, Dolen, and Dudley.

fr.lifeSummary: Dolan a eu au moins 1 fille.

ja.lifeSummary: Dolanは少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Dolan(은)는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: У Dolan была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Dolan tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.
